title: Magic Mole's New Apartment and the Great Nut Feast
summary: A stuffed mole celebrates moving into his whimsical new apartment by hosting his friend Seeker for a tour of his piano and special apple-shaped stool. Together with Isabella, they visit their neighbor Pakarito, a chipmunk with a gourmet stash of hazelnuts and walnuts. While the friends enjoy a nut-filled feast, they dream of a magic potion that could help a toothless stuffie join in on the crunchy snacks before nap time ends their adventure.

highlightQuote.text: I can't bring nuts to school, to my Montessori school.

transcript.text: Papa, my favorite chair started dies.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Dad, can you replace my mamma card?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Yeah.
Dad, until the end of stars and stories I will take it off.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, okay.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Once upon a time...
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: The Magic Mole Stuffie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The Magic Mole Stuffie and Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what were they doing together?
No, no, I could just keep on the story and then you find out.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: The Magic Mole Stuffie said, "Welcome to my new apartment."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, "Oh, thank you, it's a beautiful place. What have you got here? Show me around."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what did Magic Mole Stuffie say?
Well, what do you have in there? What do you have in there? What did you store?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Magic Mole Stuffie said, "Well, I have a beautiful setup that Izzy the Kiddo made for me and it has a piano, and I'm gonna learn how to play, and it has a big half-an-apple with a stool to get to it, and it has a toilet, oh, and look at this!"
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: A flower?
It has a flower, that's right. And Seeker said, "Wow, what a nice setup, you're very lucky to have that. Did you just move in today?"
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I think the mole just did move in today.
Yeah, just today. And Seeker said, "Oh, where did you live before?"
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Underground.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, um, where did you live underground?
Through a door.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Izzy
transcript.text: In the rusty old room. In the rusty old room.
And Magic Mole Stuffie, can I meet your friend?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Um, yes, said Magic Mole Stuffie, you can meet my friend. Who is it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Also Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, would you like to visit the Magic Mole Stuffie's friend named Pakarito?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Pakarito? Who's Pakarito? said Seeker.
He's a chipmunk and she lived in through a door with the Magic Mole Stuffie.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, she did? But not anymore?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Not anymore, but Seeker, do you want to meet her and...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, yes, I'm curious to meet this chipmunk named Pakarito. Where does she live now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She lives, um, she lives, oh, maybe she lives next door.
Oh yeah, she lives in the apartment next door.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Pakarito, ding-dong.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Um, hello? Who's there?
It's, it's, it's Seeker, Magic Mole Stuffie, and Isabella the Kiddo.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh hi! Well, oh, welcome to the neighborhood! Come on in! Would you like a snack? I've got lots of yummy things. Come on in, come on in.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Dad
transcript.text: Okay, have a seat. Here, you can sit around my coffee table and I'll serve you some, um, I have nuts, nuts, or nuts. What would you like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Nuts.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Good choice! Here you go, everybody. And Pakarito brought out a heaping big bowl of all different kinds of nuts and put them on the table.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Uh, no, I have a few nuts. I have a few nuts at home. Some hazelnuts, I have some walnuts, I have some pecans.
I can't bring nuts to school, to my Montessori school.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, that's too bad. I love nuts and I've never had a hazelnut. Sounds like you have a really good collection of nuts.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah. Do you like, do you like walnuts?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: I do, that's one of my favorite kinds of nuts. I love walnuts.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Do you like pecans?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Those are delicious too, absolutely.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you like acorns?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I like acorns.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh I do, they're one of my favorites. Yum yum yum yum. Those are the best. And Seeker said, "I'm partial to walnuts myself," and he cracked one open and started to nibble it.
"And what do you like to eat by way of nuts?" said Seeker, addressing the Magic Mole Stuffie.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Dad
transcript.text: And the Magic Mole Stuffie said, "Well, I don't know, I never really ate any nuts because I don't really have, um, you know, I don't have teeth because I'm a stuffie, unfortunately."
And Seeker said, "Oh, that's a shame. Perhaps with a little work I could make a magic potion that would give you the ability to eat nuts. You could have magic teeth. What do you think about that?"
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And Magic Mole Stuffie said, "Wow, that would be very nice, thank you Seeker."
transcript.speaker: Dad
Dad
transcript.text: And Pakarito said, "Well, it's almost time for my, uh, nap. Yeah, I gotta take a nap, so, um, thanks for coming over everybody. I'd love to come over your house sometime, but for now I gotta, I gotta clean up, okay?"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Pakarito cleaned up all the nuts, and Seeker and the Magic Mole Stuffie and Isabella the Kiddo said thank you and goodbye.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And that's the end of our story.

characters.name: Magic Mole Stuffie
characters.description: A stuffed mole who has just moved into a new apartment featuring a piano and unique furniture.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Pakarito
characters.description: A friendly chipmunk neighbor who owns an extensive collection of various nuts.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

places.name: Magic Mole's Apartment
places.description: A stylish new home equipped with a piano, a toilet, a decorative flower, and a stool made of a half-apple.

places.name: The Underground
places.description: The former subterranean residence of Magic Mole Stuffie and Pakarito, located behind a door in a rusty old room.

places.name: Pakarito's Apartment
places.description: The neighboring home where the friends gather to share a large bowl of assorted nuts.
